name: ExtensionExplanationOfBenefit_AddItem_ProductOrServiceEnd
title: R5: End of a range of codes (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `ExplanationOfBenefit.addItem.productOrServiceEnd` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`ExplanationOfBenefit.addItem.productOrServiceEnd` 0..1 `CodeableConcept`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `ExplanationOfBenefit.addItem.productOrServiceEnd` 0..1 `CodeableConcept`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `ExplanationOfBenefit.addItem.productOrServiceEnd` has a context of ExplanationOfBenefit.addItem based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `ExplanationOfBenefit`.
Element `ExplanationOfBenefit.addItem.productOrServiceEnd` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: End of a range of codes (new)
element.comment:
Element `ExplanationOfBenefit.addItem.productOrServiceEnd` has a context of ExplanationOfBenefit.addItem based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `ExplanationOfBenefit`.
Element `ExplanationOfBenefit.addItem.productOrServiceEnd` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: End of a range of codes
element.definition: This contains the end of a range of product, service, drug or other billing codes for the item. This element is not used when the .productOrService is a group code. This value may only be present when a .productOfService code has been provided to convey the start of the range. Typically this value may be used only with preauthorizations and not with claims.
